Description: 1 or 2. Stage 1 is the temperature gradient experiment, with samples incubated at static temperatures for 8 weeks. Stage 2 is the temperature fluctuation experiment, where the temperature was changed at the interval describe in 'Scale of fluctuation' column
Time point in weeks of the experiment at which the microcosm was sampled
Temperature in degree Celsius that the microcosm was incubated at; only used where value in 'Stage' column is 1
Scale of temperature fluctuation if value in 'Stage' column is 2. Any of 'highT' (30 degrees stable), 'lowT' (15 degrees stable), '2Weeks', '1Week', '2Days'
0 or 1. 0 Indicates that total DNA was sequenced. 1 indicates that heavy (labelled) DNA was sequenced
